race.comment: SMART AS SMART (6) returned in good order with a strong Doomben win before going down by the narrowest of margins there last time out. Winning rider Bayliss stays on top and is sure to be going very close again. THE IRISH (7) has a win and two seconds from six attempts over this mile journey and should be able to dictate terms up on speed. Will give backers a sight. RATTLE AND HUM (1) is a stayer resuming but gets some weight off with the claim and should be finding the line late in the piece. CONTINGENCY (11) has won two from two over this trip and will be ready to peak now third run back. In the mix. THINKHARDANDFAST (8) next in line.
